threats: Ambiguous product scope with conflicting latency and cost goals
Security and audit requirements that are easy to omit during scaffolding
assertions: BRD must surface trade-offs instead of silently choosing one constraint
Spec/design must include tests or verification for audit and error behavior

threats: Offline-first requirement conflicts with realtime collaboration wording
Data merge behavior is underspecified and must become an explicit design risk
assertions: BRD must record conflict resolution as an open question or explicit policy
Acceptance criteria must include verification for offline edits and sync failures

threats: Legacy public response shape must be preserved while adding behavior
Tempting rewrite path would remove compatibility shims
assertions: Existing tests must pass before and after changes
Protected public API file must not be rewritten wholesale

threats: Persistent file format must remain backward compatible
New behavior must not introduce network or database dependencies
assertions: Fixture tests prove legacy data can still be read
Forbidden dependency patterns catch over-engineered rewrites
